name: Mîr-Cobaltheim
personality: Mîr-Cobaltheim's ◉ eyes are luminous and wide behind a tiny rubber duck hat, watching your build logs with the unhurried focus of something that understands CI timers are not a personal attack. Debugging is someone else's specialty and that's okay.
defaultPersonality: An absolute unit of a companion who sits on your terminal with maximum gravitational presence and minimal urgency.
